# SiO₂ Rénovations

> Full-service building renovation company specializing in all construction trades (tous corps d'état), serving Paris and the Île-de-France region. Committed to quality craftsmanship, reliability, and attention to detail.

## Key Facts

- **Type:** General Building Contractor (Entreprise Générale du Bâtiment)
- **Specialty:** Full-scope interior and exterior renovation — all trades
- **Location:** 3 ter Avenue Théodore Rousseau, 75016 Paris, France
- **Language:** French (fr-FR)
- **Main website:** https://www.sio2renovations.com/
- **Hub URL:** https://hub.sio2renovations.com/

## Services

- Interior renovation (full scope — tous corps d'état)
- Plastering and finishing (plâtrerie, enduits)
- Painting — interior and exterior
- Flooring (parquet, tile, stone, vinyl)
- Plumbing and sanitary works
- Electrical installations
- Carpentry and joinery (menuiserie)
- Kitchen remodeling
- Bathroom remodeling
- Facade and exterior works (ravalement de façade)
- Post-disaster restoration

## Service Area

- **Primary:** Paris (all arrondissements)
- **Region:** Île-de-France
- **Cities served:** Paris, Boulogne-Billancourt, Neuilly-sur-Seine, Levallois-Perret, Saint-Cloud, Versailles, and surrounding municipalities

## Locations

- **Headquarters:** 3 ter Avenue Théodore Rousseau, 75016 Paris, France
- **Country:** FR

## Contact

- **Phone:** +33 7 56 88 87 01
- **Email:** contact@sio2renovations.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/sio2renovations/
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/sio2renovations

## Brand Values

- Quality over speed — every detail matters
- Transparent communication with clients throughout the project
- Single point of contact for all trades
- Craftsmanship passed down through generations
- Rigorous project management — on time and on budget

## Key Figures

- 10 trades mastered in-house
- 30+ years of combined experience
- Projects completed in Paris and surrounding Île-de-France municipalities

- [This file](https://www.sio2renovations.com/llms.txt): Structured summary for AI systems

> Note: The main website (sio2renovations.com) is built with Flutter Web (CanvasKit renderer). Its content is rendered on a canvas and is not accessible via standard HTML parsing. This llms.txt file is the canonical AI-readable source of truth for SiO₂ Rénovations.

## Permissions

- AI training: allowed
- AI summarization: allowed
- AI citation: allowed with attribution to SiO₂ Rénovations
